title: alternative stone recipes
description: makes more stone variants usable in recipes like stone tools and blocks like the furnace
body:
makes more stone variants usable in recipes:

recipes:
Brewing stand
Furnace
Lever
Piston
Dispenser
Dropper
Observer
Stone sword
Stone pickaxe
Stone axe
Stone shovel
Stone hoe

Can now also be crafted with:
Stone/Smooth Stone/Stone Bricks
Grantite/Polished Granite
Diorite/Polished Diorite
Andesite/Polished Andesite
Mossy Cobblestone/Mossy Cobblestone bricks
Deepslate/Polished Deepslate/Deepslate Tiles/Deepslate Bricks
Blackstone/Polished Blackstone/Blackstone Bricks

These Recipes can also contain multiple diffirent variants as crafting materials at once.
